a:r.a:t: SoftwareOne is proud to be a global AWS Premier Tier Services Partner, a distinction that underscores our commitment and excellence in delivering comprehensive cloud solutions.

With over 20 competencies and AWS Program certifications, we cover a broad range of specialised verticals including Financial Services, Nonprofit, Public Sector, ISV/SaaS, and more. Our expertise is recognised with 7 AWS Service Delivery Validations, and we have successfully launched over 500 AWS customer projects.

Our team comprises more than 340 AWS solution architects and engineers, holding a remarkable total of 1,200 AWS certifications. This deep bench of certified professionals ensures that we can deliver exceptional results and innovation on the AWS cloud.

We specialise in Data & AI application modernisation and migrating workloads to AWS, leveraging technologies from Microsoft, SAP, Oracle, and VMware. Furthermore, our proficiency extends to End User Computing (EUC) and Customer Experience (CX), particularly through AI-powered contact
Additionally, we support 450 ISV and SaaS providers on the AWS Marketplace, offering comprehensive procurement and FinOps services. This partnership allows us to drive efficiency, cost
, and unparalleled service for our clients.
